mapper.sql: SELECT c.id, c.created_by, u.username AS creator_username, c.title, c.slug, c.description, c.cover_image_url, c.challenge_type, c.entity_types, c.target_count, c.required_genres, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.xp_reward, c.badge_name, c.badge_image_url, c.participant_count, c.completion_count, c.is_official, c.is_active, c.created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reading_challenges (created_by, title, slug, description, cover_image_url, challenge_type, entity_types, target_count, required_genres, required_list_id, start_date, end_date, xp_reward, badge_name, badge_image_url, participant_count, completion_count, is_official, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{createdBy}, #{title}, #{slug}, #{description}, #{coverImageUrl}, #{challengeType}, #{entityTypes, typeHandler=com.naskah.demo.typehandler.StringArrayTypeHandler}, #{targetCount}, #{requiredGenres, typeHandler=com.naskah.demo.typehandler.StringArrayTypeHandler}, #{requiredListId}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{xpReward}, #{badgeName}, #{badgeImageUrl}, 0, 0, #{isOfficial}, TRUE, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE reading_challenges SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, cover_image_url = #{coverImageUrl}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, xp_reward = #{xpReward}, badge_name = #{badgeName}, badge_image_url = #{badgeImageUrl}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reading_challenges SET is_active = FALSE WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: , CASE WHEN #{currentUserId} IS NOT NULL THEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM challenge_participants cp WHERE cp.challenge_id = c.id AND cp.user_id = #{currentUserId}) ELSE FALSE END AS is_joined, (SELECT status FROM challenge_participants cp2 WHERE cp2.challenge_id = c.id AND cp2.user_id = #{currentUserId} LIMIT 1) AS my_status, (SELECT progress_count FROM challenge_participants cp3 WHERE cp3.challenge_id = c.id AND cp3.user_id = #{currentUserId} LIMIT 1) AS my_progress FROM reading_challenges c JOIN users u ON u.id = c.created_by WHERE c.id = #{challengeId}

, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT} IS NOT NULL THEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM challenge_participants cp WHERE cp.challenge_id = c.id AND cp.user_id = #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}) ELSE FALSE END AS is_joined, (SELECT status FROM challenge_participants cp2 WHERE cp2.challenge_id = c.id AND cp2.user_id = #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT} LIMIT 1) AS my_status, (SELECT progress_count FROM challenge_participants cp3 WHERE cp3.challenge_id = c.id AND cp3.user_id = #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT} LIMIT 1) AS my_progress FROM reading_challenges c JOIN users u ON u.id = c.created_by WHERE c.is_active = TRUE AND (c.end_date IS NULL OR c.end_date >= CURRENT_DATE) ORDER BY c.is_official DESC, c.participant_count DESC, c.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

, TRUE AS is_joined, cp.status AS my_status, cp.progress_count AS my_progress FROM reading_challenges c JOIN users u ON u.id = c.created_by JOIN challenge_participants cp ON cp.challenge_id = c.id AND cp.user_id = #{userId} WHERE c.is_active = TRUE AND cp.status = #{status} ORDER BY cp.joined_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reading_challenges WHERE is_active = TRUE AND (end_date IS NULL OR end_date >= CURRENT_DATE)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM challenge_participants cp JOIN reading_challenges c ON c.id = cp.challenge_id WHERE cp.user_id = #{userId} AND c.is_active = TRUE AND cp.status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO challenge_participants (challenge_id, user_id, status, progress_count, joined_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{challengeId}, #{userId}, 'in_progress', 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE challenge_participants SET status = #{status}, progress_count = #{progressCount}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM challenge_participants WHERE challenge_id = #{challengeId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE reading_challenges SET participant_count = participant_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reading_challenges SET completion_count = completion_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO challenge_progress_items (participant_id, entity_type, entity_id, entity_title, entity_slug, entity_cover, completed_at) VALUES (#{participantId}, #{entityType}, #{entityId}, #{entityTitle}, #{entitySlug}, #{entityCover}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM challenge_progress_items WHERE participant_id = #{participantId} ORDER BY completed_at DESC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY cp.progress_count DESC, cp.joined_at ASC) AS rank, u.id AS user_id, u.username, COALESCE(sp.display_name, u.full_name) AS display_name, u.profile_picture_url AS user_photo, cp.progress_count, cp.status, cp.completed_at, cp.joined_at FROM challenge_participants cp JOIN users u ON u.id = cp.user_id LEFT JOIN user_social_profiles sp ON sp.user_id = u.id WHERE cp.challenge_id = #{challengeId} ORDER BY cp.progress_count DESC, cp.joined_at ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM challenge_participants WHERE challenge_id = #{challengeId}
